---
name: Feature request
about: New tool, new filter, new behavior, new docs.
title: "[feature] "
labels: feature
---

## What

One sentence: what should this plugin be able to do that it can't today?

## Why

What operator need does this serve? What workflow does it unblock? Concrete examples beat abstract reasoning.

## Sketch (optional)

If you have an idea for the tool shape, paste it:

```
ebay_research_<tool_name>(param1, param2?, param3?)
  → returns { ... }
```

## Out of scope reminders

This plugin is **read-only**. Write-side seller operations belong in `@tangleclaw/openclaw-ebay-seller`. If your request involves listing, publishing, bidding, or messaging — open the issue there, not here.

## Alternatives considered

What did you try first? Why doesn't an existing tool cover this?
